title: Carol Clair
compiled_truth: Carol Clair is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-07-03), Carol Clair sent 2802 and received 2072 emails, totalling 4874 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (376), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (294), [Susan Bailey](people/susan-bailey) (262), [Suzanne Adams](people/suzanne-adams) (223), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (197). Mailbox folders observed: ees_matters, sent.
